info.name: NetPay Card Backend API
info.description:
Complete API collection for NetPay Card Backend (Node.js/Express). Base URL: http://localhost:5000/api

**Auth Headers:**
- User routes: `Authorization: Bearer {{user_token}}`
- Admin routes: `Authorization: Bearer {{admin_token}}`
- Merchant routes: `Authorization: Bearer {{merchant_token}}`
- External Card API: `X-API-Key: {{api_key}}`

Login karne ke baad token automatically collection variables mein save ho jaata hai.

request.description: coinKey options: USDT_TRC20 | USDT_BEP20 | USDT_ERC20 | USDT_POLYGON | USDT_ARB | USDT_BASE | USDT_AVAX | USDT_OP

query.description: Search by txId, txHash, user name/email
TRC20 | BEP20 | ERC20 | POLYGON | ARBITRUM | BASE | AVALANCHE | OPTIMISM

body.description: amount is optional — omit to credit original deposit amount

query.description: pending | approved | processing | completed | rejected | failed

url.description: chain: TRC20 | BEP20 | ERC20 | POLYGON | ARBITRUM | BASE | AVALANCHE | OPTIMISM
